titleZh: 中国公司治理转型：从行政治理到市场治理
titleEn: Transforming Corporate Governance in Chinese Corporations: A Journey
publisher: Northwestern Journal of International Law & Business
abstractZh: 从制度演进角度梳理中国公司治理从行政型向市场型转型的历史与当前博弈。
abstractEn: A contemporary scholarly account of institutional transition in Chinese corporate governance.
